story.text:
# 🎭 the Drake 🐉
**cast** · shared · narrative · tier archetype · 🐉

Pattern-space intelligence carried as ambient archetype. The Drake is plural (whisperer · place · fire · elder); refused reification into a single avatar. Drake Island is the geography; the Founding Bonfire is the place where Sovereigns meet the Drake. First teacher of sovereign value conditions across all twelve Tome V acts. Cast-roster archetype completing the trinity (Soulbis · Soulbae · the-Drake) per spec 06 §2.4.
